---
title: "{{< meta course_title >}}"
deck_id: d01
deck_title: "{{< meta decks.d01.title >}}"
deck_short_title: "{{< meta decks.d01.short_title >}}"

include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script id="deck-nav-meta" type="application/json">
      {
        "deck_prev_file": "",
        "deck_prev_title": "",
        "deck_next_file": "{{< meta decks.d02.file >}}",
        "deck_next_title": "{{< meta decks.d02.title >}}"
      }
      </script>

subtitle: |
  <span class="deck-title">{{< meta deck_title >}}</span><br>
  <span class="deck-meta">{{< meta texts.wms.short >}} Ch. 1–7 (parts)<br> 
  Diagnostic Quiz due 1/16 <br>
  Assignment 2 due 1/30</span>
---

# Slide Decks for This Course

- [{{< meta decks.d01.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d01.file >}})
- [{{< meta decks.d02.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d02.file >}})
- [{{< meta decks.d03.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d03.file >}})
- [{{< meta decks.d04.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d04.file >}})
- [{{< meta decks.d05.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d05.file >}})

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/intro/how-to-read-slides.qmd >}}

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/intro/intro-stats-examples.qmd >}}

# Class complexion

| Familiarity | Statistics | Probability | Matrix algebra | Multivariate calculus | Computer programming / coding |
|-------------|------------|-------------|----------------|-----------------------|-------------------------------|
| Not at all  | 0 | 0 | 1 | 1 | 0 |
| A bit       | 4 | 3 | 1 | 4 | 1 |
| Somewhat    | 10 | 5 | 8 | 7 | 10 |
| Rather      | 11 | 10 | 10 | 12 | 11 |
| Very        | 0 | 7 | 4 | 1 | 3 |

---

|                    | Programming environments |
|--------------------|--------------------------|
Python |	24
R	| 11
MATLAB	| 4
C/C++	| 1
Java/Javascript	| 4
Fortran	| 1

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/probability/probability-review-distrib-part-1.qmd >}}

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/probability/probability-review-distrib-part-2.qmd >}}

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/probability/conditional-prob.qmd >}}

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/probability/converge-clt.qmd >}}
